allow:
Bash(# Copy what we CAN resolve: 1.png→tent, 2.png→mushroom, image.gif→fire
cp /tmp/img_extract/1.png ~/Desktop/frida-amiel-app/public/assets/tent.png
cp /tmp/img_extract/2.png ~/Desktop/frida-amiel-app/public/assets/mushroom.png
cp /tmp/img_extract/3.png ~/Desktop/frida-amiel-app/public/assets/moon.png
cp ~/Downloads/image.gif ~/Desktop/frida-amiel-app/public/assets/fire.gif
echo "Done. Checking sizes:"
ls -lh ~/Desktop/frida-amiel-app/public/assets/
echo "---"
echo "Existing sprites:"
ls -lh ~/Desktop/frida-amiel-app/public/sprites/)
